name: C# 10 Dev Container (Ubuntu + NVIM 0.11)
onCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y curl ripgrep fzf python3 openssh-server && curl -LO https://github.com/neovim/neovim/releases/latest/download/nvim-linux-x86_64.tar.gz && sudo rm -rf /opt/nvim-linux-x86_64 && sudo tar -C /opt -xzf nvim-linux-x86_64.tar.gz && export PATH="$PATH:/opt/nvim-linux-x86_64/bin"
